This dirty fixture contains synthetic forbidden samples for sanitizer tests.
All values below are fake and only used under the allowed dirty fixture directory.

FAKE_TOKEN=ghp_FAKE_SAMPLE_TOKEN_FOR_TESTS_ONLY
FAKE_OPENAI_KEY=sk-FAKE_SAMPLE_TOKEN_FOR_TESTS_ONLY
FAKE_AWS_KEY=AKIAFAKESAMPLEKEY0000
FAKE_EMAIL=user@private.invalid
FAKE_PATH=C:\Users\harry\example
